summary.key_theme: 公司財報表現優於預期，引發多家券商上調目標價，推動股價強勁上漲。

bullish.title: Amprius (AMPX) Soars to All-Time High on PT Hike After Earnings Blowout
bullish.reason: 財報表現亮眼（Earnings Blowout）是近期股價飆升的根本原因，該報導涵蓋了業績超預期與股價創歷史新高的關鍵資訊，最具代表性。

bullish.title: B. Riley Securities Maintains Buy on Amprius Technologies, Raises Price Target to $22
bullish.reason: 分析師 Christopher Souther 將目標價從 $16 上調至 $22，明確的估值提升訊號直接帶動了市場買盤。

bullish.title: Needham Reiterates Buy on Amprius Technologies, Maintains $20 Price Target
bullish.reason: Needham 分析師 Austin Bohlig 重申買入評級並維持 $20 目標價，顯示機構投資人對公司長期成長潛力持續看好。

bullish.title: Amprius (AMPX) Soars 52.2% on Analyst Upgrade, Upbeat Outlook
bullish.reason: 報導指出股價單日飆升 52.2%，反映了市場對分析師升級與樂觀展望的強烈正面反應。

bullish.title: How The Amprius Technologies (AMPX) Investment Story Is Shifting After New Targets And Guidance
bullish.reason: 深入分析公司在發布新指引後的投資邏輯轉變，有助於投資人理解股價重估（Re-rating）的背後動能。

bullish.title: Amprius Technologies shares are trading higher after B. Riley Securities raised its price target on the stock from $16 to $22.
bullish.reason: 此為針對 B. Riley 調整目標價後的市場即時反應報導，與前述分析師評級新聞內容高度重疊。

bullish.title: Amprius Technologies (AMPX) Reports Earnings & Sees Analyst Coverage
bullish.reason: 總結了財報發布後的市場動態與分析師覆蓋情況，作為近期事件的綜合回顧。
